offer: For property managers handling 10-50 rental units, manual tracking of rent payments causes late notifications of delinquencies. We automate monthly rent roll reports instead of manual spreadsheets and email reminders.
problem: manual tracking of rent payments and reporting
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Indie Hackers posts about similar workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Community forums where property managers share tools
try_it: Let users try email notifications for payment delinquencies
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
